title: Fresh Fragrant Middle Eastern Bread Fattoush
description: A peppery and energizing Middle Eastern dish featuring chopped chive and long-fermentation-dough, perfect for a healthy snack or lunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit to toast the bread
Cut the long-fermentation-dough bread into small cubes and toast in the oven for 5 minutes
In a large bowl, combine the toasted bread, chopped chive, mixed greens, crumbly feta cheese, diced cucumber, and diced tomato
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper to make the dressing
Pour the dressing over the bread mixture and toss to combine
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld
Serve the fattoush chilled, garnished with additional chopped chive if desired
